alt_text.homepage-hero.png: Homepage showcasing headline 'Six apps. One binary. Zero dependencies.' with dynamic stat counters under a dark western themed visual.
alt_text.console-preview.png: Homepage section displaying Stockyard's console with tabbed previews of apps like Proxy, Observe, and Trust against a dark western backdrop.
alt_text.pricing-table.png: Three-tier pricing comparison chart for Stockyard, detailing options for Self-hosted free, Cloud pro, and Enterprise against a minimalist design.
alt_text.observe-traces.png: Observe app page showing a detailed request traces table with columns for latency, cost, and model, all in a dark-themed layout.
alt_text.trust-ledger.png: Trust app page presenting a hash-chained audit ledger featuring a block visualization, set in a dark western-inspired interface.
alt_text.studio-templates.png: Studio app page displaying a list of prompt templates along with progress bars for A/B experiments within a rustic theme.
alt_text.forge-dag.png: Forge app page visualizing a DAG workflow with connected nodes titled: Extract topics, Draft article, Fetch sources, Edit & fact-check, Format output.
alt_text.modules-grid.png: Modules grid section highlighting 58 middleware modules organized by function, laid out in Stockyard's signature dark western style.
alt_text.playground.png: Interactive LLM playground featuring model selector, system prompt, and chat interface, designed with a rustic, dark visual theme.

tweets.text: Stockyard is here: A single Go binary, powered by SQLite, with zero external dependencies. Streamline your LLM workflows effortlessly. It's the tech elegance you've been waiting for. #LLM #GoLang stockyard.dev
Tired of wrangling 134+ fragmented LLM tools? Meet Stockyard: The all-in-one platform where your LLM traffic gets sorted. Simplify your stack and reclaim your sanity. stockyard.dev
What if Docker but for LLMs? Introducing Stockyard: A unified platform to tame the LLM chaos, replacing hundreds of tools with one elegant solution. stockyard.dev
Stockyard offers it all: rate limiting, load balancing, semantic caching, and more. All wrapped in a dark western theme. Saddle up and check out the full feature set! stockyard.dev
We've shipped Stockyard! Your new best friend in LLM infrastructure is live. Tackle LLM madness with style. Dive in now and see the difference. stockyard.dev

product_hunt.description: Meet Stockyard, the open-source LLM infrastructure platform that slashes the chaos of 134+ middleware tools into a single Go binary. Packed with 6 apps and 58 modules. Zero external dependencies. Self-host or cloud. Rodeo-ready.
product_hunt.maker_comment:
Hey Product Hunt! 🎉

We're thrilled to introduce Stockyard, born out of the frustration with the fragmented mess of tools developers juggle to manage LLM traffic. It's like herding cats, but with code—and it's long overdue for a proper solution. Stockyard is our rebellious answer, combining all the essential pieces into a single Go binary with zero external dependencies.

Whether you're looking to optimize with rate limiting, load balancing, semantic caching, or just want a sleek way to manage cost tracking and audit logging, Stockyard has you covered. With its dark western theme, it not only corrals your LLM tasks but does so with style. We built this because we were sick of workarounds and patchwork. It's time for a tool built for developers, by developers, that actually makes sense.

github.description: Stockyard: The definitive open-source LLM infrastructure platform. Say goodbye to 134+ fragmented tools; manage, audit, and optimize your LLM traffic like a pro with zero dependencies.
